---
title: "Julia Elizabeth Kennedy"
---

## Julia Elizabeth Kennedy

**Dates:** 1839-1916

### Description

supporter of women\'s education

### Biography

See Christopher Stray, ‘Kennedy, Marion Grace (1836–1914)’, Oxford Dictionary of National Biography, Oxford University Press, 2004 [http://www.oxforddnb.com/view/article/
48417, accessed 2 Aug 2011]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th 1877 
- Letter from Feb 13th 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
